lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: We need to teach Hadi a lesson for disrespecting us.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: IQRASH
lines.line: Agreed, he's been pushing his luck for too long.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HAMMAD
lines.line: I think I have a better idea. Why not challenge him to the annual car race? If he loses, he'll know his place.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAMMAD, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: You think you can beat us, Hadi? We've been training for months.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HADI
lines.line: I've been racing for years, you two are just amateurs.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: IQRASH
lines.line: We'll see about that. Let's see who's laughing at the end of the day.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HAMMAD
lines.line: Actually, guys, I think Hadi might have a point. We should focus on our own driving skills instead of trying to intimidate him.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of IQRASH, a fierce glint in her eye.

lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: I don't trust you, Hammad. You're just trying to get out of a fight.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HAMMAD
lines.line: I'm trying to get us to win, Haider. And I think my plan is the best one.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAMMAD, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: IQRASH
lines.line: What makes you so sure, Hammad?
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HAMMAD
lines.line: Because I've been studying Hadi's driving patterns. He has a weakness in his braking technique.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAMMAD, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: Come on, Iqrash, you can do better than this!
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: IQRASH
lines.line: I'm trying, Haider! But Hadi's driving like a pro!
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HADI
lines.line: Ha! You two are no match for me!
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: IQRASH
lines.line: Hadi, you idiot! You should have listened to us.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HADI
lines.line: I... I didn't mean to lose. Congratulations, guys.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.
